headline: Congress just gave DHS another $70 billion
summary: Congress approved $70 billion for the Department of Homeland Security. The funding supports President Trump's mass deportation agenda. The vote passed narrowly over three years, largely along party lines.

headline: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
summary: Apple will introduce subscription bundles for iPhone apps later this year. Bundles can combine offers from different companies, similar to video streaming. This expansion aims to simplify diverse app subscriptions for users.

headline: GM thinks EVs can help offset AI’s energy suck with vehicle-to-grid tech
summary: GM unveiled new EV battery and energy storage initiatives. Vehicle-to-grid (V2G) capabilities are being activated for EV and home energy customers. This tech aims to combat growing electricity demand from AI data centers.

headline: Microsoft AI head calls out Anthropic for acting like Claude is conscious
summary: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman criticized Anthropic's speculation about Claude's consciousness. Suleyman labels such claims as "dangerous," potentially influencing chatbot behavior. He argues against suggesting AI models possess sentience.

headline: Nintendo Switch Sports Resort Physical Editions Are up for Preorder at Amazon
summary: Physical editions of Nintendo Switch Sports Resort are available for preorder on Amazon. The game offers most Switch Sports features, plus notable additions. Fans can secure their copy of the new title.

headline: Jujutsu Kaisen Rumble: Survivaton Revealed as Unexpected Collab From the Vampire Survivors Team
summary: "Jujutsu Kaisen Rumble: Survivaton" has been announced. It's a surprise collaboration from the creators of "Vampire Survivors." The game blends shoot-'em-up mechanics with the popular "Jujutsu Kaisen" anime.

headline: The iBuyPower Element Pro Ryzen X3D Edition Gaming PC With GeForce RTX 5070 GPU Drops to $1,449
summary: The iBuyPower Element Pro Ryzen X3D Gaming PC is now priced at $1,449. It features an RTX 5070 GPU, ideal for 1080p and 1440p gaming. This prebuilt machine is also capable of running games in 4K.

headline: Destiny 2 Hits Highest Player Count in Two Years Following Final Update's Release, Shatters Marathon's All-Time Peak
summary: Destiny 2 recorded its highest player count in two years. This surge follows the release of the game's final major update. The player peak surpassed Marathon's all-time record.

headline: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
summary: David Sullivan is banned from contacting West Ham women's and youth teams. The ban has been active since 2023. It stems from a safeguarding investigation by the Football Association.

headline: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
summary: Rebel forces in Myanmar are reportedly losing ground. The military is forcibly conscripting men into its ranks. The BBC offers a frontline view of the escalating conflict.

headline: US striking Iran in response to downing of helicopter, military says
summary: The US military announced strikes against Iran. This action follows Iran's downing of a US helicopter. President Trump had vowed retaliation for the incident over the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Bowen: Trump and Netanyahu wanted to reshape the Middle East - now they risk a permacrisis
summary: Trump and Netanyahu aimed to reshape the Middle East, according to Bowen. Their miscalculations, especially regarding the Iran war, led to unintended consequences. The region now faces a potential "permacrisis" due to their policies.
